package rulefixtures

import (
	"crypto/subtle"
)

// scenario for timing_attack_on_token_comparison: `token == expectedToken` or `bytes.Equal(token, expected)` for comparing authentication tokens, API keys, or HMAC values
// fixture polarity: negative; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario741Negative(token []byte, expected []byte) bool {
	return subtle.ConstantTimeCompare(token, expected) == 1
}
